subtitle.ja: 左手に輪を乗せて始めます。右手で輪を持ち、左人差し指と中指の間に輪を通してはさみます
subtitle.en: Begin with the loop on the left hand. Hold the loop with the right hand and pass it between the left index and middle fingers, pinching it there.

subtitle.ja: 右手で持っている輪を左人差し指と中指にかけて手のひら側に回します
subtitle.en: Place the loop held in the right hand onto the left index and middle fingers and carry it around to the palm side.

subtitle.ja: 右手を半回転させて輪をねじり、左人差し指と中指にかけます。右手を離します
subtitle.en: Turn the right hand halfway to twist the loop, place it onto the left index and middle fingers, and release the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指と中指の輪の中から、はさんでいる2本の糸を右手で引き出します
subtitle.en: From inside the left index- and middle-finger loops, draw out with the right hand the two pinched strings.

subtitle.ja: 引き出した2本の輪の人差し指側を左親指で、中指側を左小指で取ります。右手を離します
subtitle.en: Take the index-finger side of the two drawn-out loops on the left thumb and the middle-finger side on the left little finger, and release the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指と中指の背同士を繋ぐ1本の糸を、右手で外して完成です
subtitle.en: With the right hand, remove the single string that runs between the backs of the left index and middle fingers to show the finished figure.

subtitle.ja: 左手のひらに垂れている長い輪を右手で引くことで、おうむが羽ばたきます
subtitle.en: By pulling the long loop hanging from the left palm with the right hand, the parrot flaps its wings.
